arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag: Man Utd will need Sir Alex Ferguson despite end to ambassador role
arts.sum: Ferguson will leave his role at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag delivers verdict on shock Sir Alex Ferguson Manchester United exit
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson will stop serving as a Man United ambassador at the end of the season in the latest cost-cutting measure.

arts.ttl: The one tactical tweak Erik ten Hag must make to help Man United combat Brentford's fast and furious starts, writes MARTIN KEOWN
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: In football, every restart can be seen as a set-piece and nobody embraces this idea more than Brentford, to the extent they consider kick-offs as opportunistic as corners and free-kicks.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag breaks his silence on Sir Alex Ferguson's Man United sacking after club legend was controversially stripped of his £2million-a-year contract
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ferguson will miss Saturday's clash with Brentford at Old Trafford, the first game since he was informed that this will be his last season as an ambassador.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes telling Sir Alex Ferguson admission after Man Utd legend's ruthless axe
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has opened up on the pressure of handling expectations at Manchester United and admitted it is hard for those following Sir Alex Ferguson to match his peerless standards

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes concerning Manchester United admission: ‘We have to deal with this’
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson’s lucrative contract as an ambassador was terminated in a cost-cutting exercise by Sir Jim Ratcliffe’s Ineos, with Ten Hag conceding the Scot’s legacy has set a standard currently out of reach

arts.ttl: Man United sent Erik ten Hag 'rearing its ugly head' warning after latest setback
arts.sum: Manchester United continue to struggle with injury problems under Erik ten Hag and Premier League injury expert Ben Dinnery has offered an explanation

arts.ttl: GRAEME SOUNESS: The disgraceful move to ditch Sir Alex Ferguson proves Man United's owners don't understand how football really works
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: I am struggling to think of any action that the geniuses running Man United could have taken to turn more people against them than terminating Sir Alex Ferguson's contract.

arts.ttl: Will Sir Alex Ferguson be at Man United vs Brentford after Old Trafford exit?
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the side are back in action on Saturday, just days after it was revealed that Sir Alex Ferguson will be leaving his ambassadorial role.

arts.ttl: Man Utd receive timely fitness boost as long-term absentee nears return
arts.sum: Manchester United left-back Tyrell Malacia is potentially just two or three weeks away from making his long-awaited return to action after more than year out injured. Erik ten Hag's team start November with the visit of Chelsea to Old Trafford, followed by PAOK in the Europa League.
